title: Execute ImageNet experiments (Phase 4)
description: Run at minimum constant + cwd_hard + no_wd on ResNet-50/ImageNet with 3 seeds (9 runs). Full plan: 5 methods x 3 seeds = 15 runs. Estimated 75 GPU-hours, ~10 hours wall-clock with 8 GPUs. This is the single most impactful addition for venue credibility.

title: Execute non-BN ablation (Phase 2)
description: Run ResNet-20 without BN on CIFAR-10: constant + cwd_hard + pmp_wd, 3 seeds each (9 runs). ~4 GPU-hours. Tests whether AIS > 0.5 without BN and whether dynamic WD helps—directly validates the mechanistic claim.

title: Fix title causal overclaim
description: Change 'Why Dynamic Weight Decay Methods Are Equivalent' to 'Dynamic Weight Decay Methods Are Equivalent' or 'When Dynamic Weight Decay Methods Are Equivalent.' Remove causal framing unless mechanistic proof is added.

title: Fix abstract experimental coverage description
description: Accurately describe the partial crossed design: 84 fully-crossed ResNet-20 runs + 21 targeted VGG-16-BN runs. Do not imply a full 2x2x2 grid.

title: Remove or downgrade CSI metric
description: Either (a) remove CSI entirely (saves ~1 page), (b) move to appendix as exploratory, or (c) derive weights from PCA loadings. CSI has zero predictive value and arbitrary construction. Redistribute space to BEM/AIS analysis.

title: Fix Section 5.7 statistical impropriety
description: Remove the claim about directional difference between two non-significant correlations, or add Steiger's z-test for dependent correlations. Current claim is statistically invalid.

title: Scope conclusion recommendations to tested conditions
description: Change 'Practitioners using AdamW can safely rely on constant weight decay' to 'On CIFAR-scale benchmarks with BN architectures, practitioners using AdamW can safely rely on constant weight decay.' Add explicit caveats for untested scales.

title: Update proposal to match delivered paper
description: The proposal still references Lyapunov/PMP/controller taxonomy as core contributions. Either update the proposal to reflect the empirical Phi framework paper that was actually written, or add the missing theoretical content.

title: Increase seed count to 5-9
description: Run 2-6 additional seeds for the core ResNet-20 experiments (both optimizers, both datasets) to achieve power for detecting 0.3-0.5% effects. This directly strengthens the null-result claim.

title: Add VGG-16-BN + AdamW experiments
description: 21 runs (7 methods x 3 seeds x CIFAR-10) to complete the 2x2 optimizer x architecture design for proper mechanism attribution.

title: Rename theorem2_validation.png
description: Rename to alignment_validation.png or cumulative_alignment.png to match actual content. Fix all internal figure references for consistency.

title: Add implementation details for CSI/AIS/BEM
description: Provide pseudocode, Hessian approximation details (iterations, batch size, train/test), and code repository link in supplementary material.

title: Execute PMP-WD and Hill function experiments (Phase 3)
description: 18 runs testing the PMP-derived optimal schedule. Only needed if the paper retains any PMP-related claims.

title: Execute steady-state formula validation (Phase 5)
description: 3 runs with detailed per-layer tracking to validate r* = gamma * E[||g||cos(theta)] / (lambda * E[Phi_t]). Provides analytical value for the Phi framework.

title: Add notation table
description: Add a paragraph or table defining all symbols (phi, delta, R_t, BEM, CSI, AIS, etc.) for reader convenience.
